summary: Iteration 300 - Share→Remix Growth Loop & Cashfree E2E Testing Complete. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). All 13 frontend pages load without JS errors. Public Creation page at /v/{slug} shows all conversion funnel elements correctly: viral-hook-badge, hero-section, social-proof, remix-main-btn, try-prompt-btn, create-own-btn, prompt-display, share-btn, cta-branding-link. Remix localStorage storage verified working (remix_data with timestamp, remixFrom object, remix_return_url). Login.js correctly reads remix_return_url after login and redirects user to tool page with prefilled fields.

issues: R2 thumbnail images blocked by CORS policy (infrastructure issue, not code bug) - images use fallback gracefully

verified_working.details: All conversion funnel elements present with correct data-testid attributes
Shows 'This was created using AI in seconds' with amber styling
Displays views and remix counts with icons
PRIMARY CTA 'Remix This' button with gradient styling
Secondary CTA 'Try This Exact Prompt' button
Tertiary CTA 'Create Your Own' button with tool routing
Shows 'Prompt used' with quoted prompt text
Share button opens menu with X/Twitter, LinkedIn, WhatsApp, Reddit, Copy Link options
After login, checks localStorage for remix_return_url and redirects correctly
Stores prompt, timestamp, source_tool, remixFrom with tool/prompt/settings/title/parentId

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 13 pages load, all conversion funnel elements verified)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user and public creations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public creation page conversion funnel fully verified. Valid slugs can be found via GET /api/public/trending-weekly or /api/public/explore. Tested slug: da85bb12-785b-4906-8fba-48de780f4a2e. Cashfree products endpoint returns gateway=cashfree, configured=true. Create-order works with INR currency. The remix flow stores remix_data and remix_return_url in localStorage, Login.js reads and clears remix_return_url after successful login, tool pages consume remix_data via useRemixData hook.

backend_tests_summary.TestPublicRoutes: 5/5 passed - creation fetch, remix increment, 404, trending, stats
backend_tests_summary.TestCashfreeCreateOrder: 3/3 passed - auth required, INR order creation, invalid product rejection
backend_tests_summary.TestPublicSharePages: 2/2 passed - share page HTML with OG tags, sitemap XML

known_infrastructure_issues: R2 storage CORS blocking direct image access (thumbnail_url) - images fallback gracefully
Cloudflare beacon.min.js blocked by CSP - non-critical analytics script
